creator: henning.matyschok@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #6)

It is not about contents of those Makefile, this code-section remains in if_vether.c, see code-base from preceeding version g20190422, "hmatyschok-if_vether-g20190422-ecc91f865218f2bb85521b285c8f7f81198aa553_GH0.tar.gz", for further details.

Therefore, there is no reason for reject version g20211111 about commited up-stream.

 Henning Andersen Matyschok, 120179M11214, USAF
